data.body: [operator-attested] Box deploy SUCCEEDS after the fixes (2026-07-15): with Dockerfile ssh -V (#694), nginx map_hash_bucket_size (#694), and compose AWS_REGION (#696), the opcert image builds, compose-opcert-1 is Up on the rebar-gerrit box, the host nginx /opcert/ route loads, Gerrit stays HTTP 200 (unaffected), and the SigV4 round-trip completes verdict=PASS with a signed rebar.opcert.v1 DSSE envelope (job ca38092f). Full evidence on 76d2.
